title: message_set non-Object patch silently dropped from response
description: message_set update loop uses 'if let Some(Value::Object(patch_map)) = Some(patch)' with no else branch. When patch is a non-Object JSON value (null, 42, 'string'), the if-let fails silently. The msg_id appears in neither updated nor notUpdated — the client gets no feedback. Identical pattern to the space_set bug fixed by adding the 'else { not_updated.insert(...invalidArguments...) }' branch. Fix: add else branch that puts msg_id in notUpdated with invalidArguments.
close_reason: Added else branch for non-Object patch values; msg_id now lands in notUpdated with invalidArguments
